posts.author: LiorHaver (Lior)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I’m creating a new timeline item in the E&A section every time there is a new outgoing phone call. The goal is that the sales rep will add the call summary in the custom activity that was created automatically, without having to create it themselves.

The issue is I’m not able to edit this activity, how can I overcome this challenge? Do you have any ideas?

image1806×1340 142 KB

Thanks!

posts.author: Billchenau (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @LiorHaver

Bill here from monday.com - welcome to the community

Our team is aware of this issue and are working on it.

It should be fixed soon.

Cheers,
Bill
